data.content: Implementation complete on main. All 7 in-scope files now have zero max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len ESLint warnings. Extracted sub-components: StateDropdown, PriorityDropdown (beat-detail), ProfileSelectField, TypePriorityRow, RelationshipSection, BeatFormActions, LabelsField, AcceptanceField (beat-form), prepareMetadata, DescriptionBlock, MetadataSection (beat-metadata-details), useMoveBeat, MoveDialogBody, isTerminalBeat (move-to-project-dialog), buildScopeParts, performGlobalSwap, AgentSelectItems, SwapControlsPanel (settings-dispatch-global-swap), hydrateSettings, SettingsTabPanels, SettingsTabBar, SettingsFooter (settings-sheet). Removed unused formatAgentLabel. All quality gates pass: lint clean for in-scope files, tsc --noEmit clean, 165 test files / 2239 tests passing, build succeeds. Commit f4e5f3c283b2 on main.
